UA Emirates seem to have a plan behind though and didn't really want to let the breakaway have its day they were controlling when the Gap was just a minute a long day in the Peloton for several including calebu and already at the back 50k's to go under the intermediate Sprint and the Breakaway having two minutes and 14 seconds at this point a victory looked impossible that soon was allowed to grow though the break working for the advantage on The Descent dropping pialater along the way and then starting the climb for a second stage finish in the history of the tour Hong Kong Colombia a spectacular site just under four minutes then the advantage as they started the final climb and behind ineos joining UAE Emirates and Yambo visma getting ready was the first to launch his attack that split the group up and UA Emirates are doing the same to the GC group the gap's still good at this point 352 as michalk verkovsky originally dropped made his way back onto a leading Trio past them and started to build a gap half a minute with 10ks to go over three minutes on the yellow Jersey group he perhaps could start to dream maharich had come to the group behind but they weren't getting any time back approaching the final five kilometers in almost a minute of a gap and still 218 on the yellow Jersey group but with pogacha and Vega go there anything was still possible the former world champion from Poland arriving in the final two kilometers with a good Gap and at that point Adam Yates started the party in the GC group s was allowed to close the gap pogacha followed vingego was there wood pogacha finally launch his attack perhaps but not in time to deny mihawk fiatkovski a second Tour stage win in his career quiatkovski with one of the victories on an illustrious palmares is winning on Bastille Day for back-to-back years then we had the moment we'd all been waiting for 450 meters to the line for gacha launched his move initially wingagor able to follow but then the Gap opened bogacho had already taken seconds back a few days previous he did the same here third place on the stage four bonus seconds a further four of the gap eight seconds taken off and just nine seconds now on the GC took all the headlines though congratulated by Tom pidcock another man who put in a very good performance in the GC OS had also failed to finish the race two more Riders down one though at the very top Michal kvyatkovski was one of the best wins of his career mochil second pogacho then vinegar pigcock in fifth place still in the yellow Jersey though the Gap reduced heading into the Alps more favored terrain for him with the longer climbs but it's nine seconds now well gotcha's lurking hinley's in third place Rodriguez and Yates fourth and fifth and so do the apps we go starting in and maths and heading up to marzin liport big climbs three first cats had an all category climb followed by the center of the colder Jew plan and a big finish in morzin you can watch all
